rationale: Policy snapshots are now recursively sanitized before serialization, dropping secret-like keys such as password, token, apiKey, authorization, cookie, credential, private_key, secret, and auth variants while preserving safe bounded policy fields. Regression coverage verifies raw policy secrets are absent from reports/remediation_context.json.

Remediation context evidence refs now serialize only MoonMind artifact IDs with the art_ prefix, filtering legacy refs, local filesystem paths, storage keys, and presigned URLs before writing the durable context artifact. Regression coverage verifies unsafe refs are excluded.
